title: Inflammation's Active Exit: The Body's Own Off-Switch for Chronic Disease
description: For decades, medicine focused on suppressing inflammation. But new research reveals inflammation isn't just a fire to put out; it's an active process with a built-in 'exit strategy.' This article explores the emerging science of pro-resolution therapies, which aim to restore the body's natural ability to clear inflammation and prevent chronic diseases from autoimmune disorders to heart disease.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Inflammation's Active Exit: The Body's Own Off-Switch for Chronic Disease
